# Game Term Translation Guide for Creators&#x20;

## Overview

This guide provides pre-translated key phrases commonly used in games, allowing creators to easily use them in their games without needing to perform separate translation work.



## System Message

<table data-full-width="true"><thead><tr><th>English</th><th>Portuguese - Singular</th><th>Portuguese - Plural</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Loading game data.</td><td>Carregando dados do jogo.</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Creating world.</td><td>Criando mundo.</td><td>Criando Mundos</td></tr><tr><td>Player [Nickname] has entered.</td><td>Jogador [Nickname] entrou no jogo</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Player [Nickname] has left the game.</td><td>Jogador [Nickname] saiu do jogo.</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Searching for player.</td><td>Procurando jogador.</td><td>Procurando jogadores</td></tr><tr><td>Waiting for player.</td><td>Aguardando jogador</td><td>Aguardando jogadores</td></tr><tr><td>Matchmaking failed. Please wait.</td><td>A partida já vai começar. Aguarde por favor!</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>The game will start in n seconds.</td><td>O jogo começará em (n -) segundos.</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Game start!</td><td>Começando o jogo!</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>The game has started!</td><td>O jogo começou!</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Player count met.
